title: Teladoc Health Inc (TDOC) Q3 2023 Earnings: Revenue Grows 8% YoY to $660.2 Million
text: Teladoc Health Q3 2023 Earnings Results. Revenue and Top-Line: Consolidated revenue grew 8% YoY to $660M. Company added nearly 4M lives in competitive takeaways during Q3. Profitability: Net loss narrowed to $57.1M ($0.35 per share). Beat earnings expectations - EPS $0.35 vs $0.37 expected. Consolidated adjusted EBITDA $89M exceeded high end of expectations. Segment Performance: Integrated Care revenue up 9% YoY to $374M, up 4% sequentially from higher chronic care enrollment (1.1M+ active users). Integrated Care delivered strong EBITDA with cost structure leverage and performance-based payment contributions. 2023 Full Year Outlook: Revenue $2,600M-$2,625M guidance, Adjusted EBITDA $320M-$330M, Net loss per share ($1.50)-($1.40).
